title: Cardboard redstone
description:
Makes the redstone stupid but also kinda cool-looking.
Surely you can't use it as your main redstone pack (because blocks are more detailed=laggier), but it's cool
body:
The first time I looked at the new crafter I thought "it looks like a box". I don't know why, but now here it is with some other redstone stuff, and looking at it now it doesn't look like a box.

I have nothing more to say, definitely it's unusable in big redstone world, unless you want to fry your PC (only the piston has like 5/6 more blocks in his model). But i made it not super detailed by using some *special tricks* while keeping a vanilla style.

All the blocks have images with all their blockstates in the gallery, but some textures are old because im lazy and i don't want to redo them.

After this update, you won't need anymore strange mods to see the redstone as white, wohooooo!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
